About Me

I am a 26-year-old Junior Backend Developer recently graduated in Multiplatform Application Development (DAM), mainly focused on Java and Spring Boot.

My goal is to continue growing as a developer while contributing my energy, commitment and willingness to learn in a company where I can keep evolving professionally and gaining real-world experience.
